evals.prompt: Create a reusable Tiptap rich-text field with controlled and uncontrolled values, a character limit, image upload hidden input, disabled/read-only states, and accessible toolbar actions.
evals.expected_output: A component package following the bundled Wysiwyg reference's composition and public API while adapting dependencies to the current application.
expectations: Preserves root, context, hook, content, menu, and trigger responsibilities
Supports controlled and uncontrolled value flows without feedback loops
Exposes disabled, read-only, invalid, required, placeholder, and limit behavior
Provides accessible names and states for toolbar controls

evals.prompt: Fix the rich-text editor so external form resets update its content without causing onChange loops. Keep the current component API and UI.
evals.expected_output: A focused synchronization fix preserving the public API and visual behavior, with regression coverage for resets and user edits.
expectations: Separates external value synchronization from user-originated updates
Avoids emitting redundant change events during reset synchronization
Preserves the component API and UI
Adds regression coverage for reset and normal editing paths
